name: Corn Bread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the flour, cornmeal, dry milk, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the shortening to the mixture and cut it in completely using your fingers or a pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Store the prepared mix in an airtight container for up to 1 month.
4. To use the mix, substitute self-rising flour by reducing baking powder to 2 tablespoons plus 1 1/2 teaspoons and omitting salt.
